positive: Minimalist celestial fox silhouette, sitting gracefully on a crescent moon. The fox is stylized with flowing, wispy tails and geometric elements, radiating soft gold energy. The background is deep midnight blue and ink black, featuring scattered constellations and abstract watercolor nebula swirls. High contrast, clean lines, symmetrical composition, vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic, ethereal lighting, pop art aesthetic influence. Central focus on the fox and moon.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, trademark, writing, messy, cluttered, noisy, cartoonish, photorealistic, 3d render
